nasb.text: It is vain for you to rise up early, To retire late, To eat the bread of painful labors; For He gives to His beloved even in his sleep.

esv.text: It is in vain that you rise up early and go late to rest, eating the bread of anxious toil; for he gives to his beloved sleep.

cnv.text: 你們清早起來，很晚才歇息， 吃勞碌得來的飯，都是徒然； 因為主必使他所愛的安睡。

ccb.text: 你早起晚睡， 为生活操劳也是徒然， 唯有耶和华所爱的人才能安眠。

csbs.text: 你们早早起来，迟迟安歇， 吃劳苦得来的饭，也是枉然； 要知道，耶和华必使他所爱的人安睡。
